# StreamBackdrops

> Free virtual backgrounds for Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet. Hundreds of images across professional and seasonal categories, all free with no signup required.

## Pages

- [Home](https://streambackdrops.com/): Browse all background categories
- [HD Backgrounds](https://streambackdrops.com/hd): Premium higher-quality backgrounds
- [Search](https://streambackdrops.com/search): Search all backgrounds
- [Blog](https://streambackdrops.com/blog): Tips and guides for video calls and remote work
- [FAQ](https://streambackdrops.com/faq): Common questions about using virtual backgrounds
- [About](https://streambackdrops.com/about): About StreamBackdrops
- [Contact](https://streambackdrops.com/contact): Contact us
- [License & Usage](https://streambackdrops.com/license): Free for personal use only

## Categories

- [Bookshelves (Bright)](https://streambackdrops.com/category/bookshelves-bright)
- [Bookshelves (Dark)](https://streambackdrops.com/category/bookshelves-dark)
- [Wall Shelves (Bright)](https://streambackdrops.com/category/wall-shelves-bright)
- [Wall Shelves (Dark)](https://streambackdrops.com/category/wall-shelves-dark)
- [Office Spaces](https://streambackdrops.com/category/office-spaces)
- [Living Rooms](https://streambackdrops.com/category/living-rooms)
- [Kitchens](https://streambackdrops.com/category/kitchens)
- [Coffee Shops](https://streambackdrops.com/category/coffee-shops)
- [Art Galleries](https://streambackdrops.com/category/art-galleries)
- [Urban Lofts](https://streambackdrops.com/category/urban-lofts)
- [Gardens & Patios](https://streambackdrops.com/category/gardens-patios)
- [Historic Spaces](https://streambackdrops.com/category/historic-spaces)
- [Nature & Landscapes](https://streambackdrops.com/category/nature-landscapes)
- [Libraries](https://streambackdrops.com/category/libraries)
- [Conference Rooms](https://streambackdrops.com/category/conference-rooms)
- [Christmas Backgrounds](https://streambackdrops.com/category/christmas-backgrounds)
- [Halloween Backgrounds](https://streambackdrops.com/category/halloween-backgrounds)
- [Valentine's Backgrounds](https://streambackdrops.com/category/valentines-backgrounds)
- [Bokeh Backgrounds](https://streambackdrops.com/category/bokeh-backgrounds)

## Notes

- All backgrounds free, no watermarks, no signup
- Personal use only — not for commercial use
- Amazon Associate affiliate links present on some pages
- Built with Next.js, hosted on Vercel
